headline: CrowdStrike FedRAMP Win Puts Public Sector Growth Versus Valuation In Focus
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) has received FedRAMP High Authorization for its Falcon for XIoT offering. The authorization allows Falcon for XIoT to be used to secure mission critical federal operational and connected systems at the highest FedRAMP impact level. CrowdStrike also introduced expanded GovCloud capabilities for U.S. public sector customers. CrowdStrike focuses on cloud delivered cybersecurity, and the new FedRAMP High Authorization places Falcon for XIoT within the...
